description_long: This is a classical-style sculpture of a robed human figure, positioned within a recessed alcove framed by two fluted columns and a rectangular base. The figure stands on a pedestal, draped in flowing garments, with one arm bent and the other holding the drapery. The alcove is painted a pale pink, contrasting with the white or light stone of the statue and columns. The architectural niche features a semi-circular arch at the top, and the base extends outward, providing stability. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or decorative monument, likely intended for public or semi-public display.
description: A classical robed human statue stands in a pink-arched alcove framed by fluted columns and a rectangular base, evoking a commemorative monument.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full robed figure in detail, framed by the pink alcove and fluted columns.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the alcove and the thickness of the structure, with minimal detail of the statue visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the solid, angular back of the structure, with no visible statue or alcove details.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the structure's depth and the edge of the alcove.
attribute_subject_matter: robed human figure in a classical architectural niche
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be installed in an architectural or urban setting, possibly as part of a public monument or building facade.
